title: Fuel distribution dispatch: tank-level → auto-delivery (FleetPanda pattern)
persona: Fuel marketer / propane / heating oil distributor
pain_description: Tank monitors tell when low; dispatcher calls customer, schedules truck, invoices. Fragmented across legacy software.
incumbent_gap: FleetPanda owns; but wider petroleum adjacents (lubricants, on-site fueling) underserved
santifer_pattern: Tank telemetry + auto-order + driver app + contract price engine + invoice
reference_build: FleetPanda. Moffitt, 3L Energy, Pacific States Petroleum, McNeece Brothers

title: AI-native ATS: passive candidate multi-channel engagement (Kula pattern)
pain_description: ATS tracks pipeline; actual sourcing + multi-channel outreach (InMail + email + LinkedIn) happens elsewhere. Recruiter spends 4+ hrs/week on data upkeep.
incumbent_gap: Legacy ATS not AI-native; Kula leading but narrow segment
santifer_pattern: Sourcing-to-offer SSOT + LLM message per candidate + multi-channel orchestration + auto-update

specific_prospects.name: Kula
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Direct competitor. Potential acquisition or integration partner.

specific_prospects.name: SHRM
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Annual conference. Talent acquisition track. Member surveys on sourcing bottlenecks.

specific_prospects.name: r/recruiting
specific_prospects.why_reachable: In-house recruiters discuss candidate sourcing, multi-channel outreach frustrations.

specific_prospects.name: TalentOps Slack communities
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Direct access to hiring decision-makers. Peer discussion on ATS pain points.

specific_prospects.name: Greenhouse
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Potential integration partner or acquisition target for Greenhouse's sourcing gap.

velocity_signal.evidence: Kula raised Series B (2025) and expanded to enterprise. Greenhouse publicly stating sourcing as strategic priority. HireEZ and other AI sourcing tools gaining adoption. Talent shortage (JOLTS reports 3.5M-plus open jobs) driving demand for passive candidate outreach at scale.
velocity_signal.trigger: Post-pandemic shift to remote-first hiring, passive candidate reluctance to apply, and talent scarcity in engineering and product roles. Multi-channel outreach is now table stakes.

buying_intent_evidence.quote: ATS tracks pipeline. Actual sourcing plus multi-channel outreach (InMail plus email plus LinkedIn) happens elsewhere. Recruiter spends 4-plus hours per week on data upkeep.
buying_intent_evidence.source_label: Kula: AI-Native ATS for Passive Candidate Engagement

buying_intent_evidence.quote: Legacy ATS not AI-native. Kula leading but narrow segment (high-growth companies, 100+ headcount).
Funding announcements and Series B raises signal market validation. Passive candidate sourcing becoming critical feature.

kill_risks.risk: Kula market dominance in high-growth segment. Controlling narrative for AI-native ATS.
kill_risks.current_status: Kula Series B funded. Enterprise momentum. Opportunity in underserved segments: mid-market (50 to 200 headcount hiring) that cannot afford Kula ($30K-plus per year), and non-tech verticals (finance, healthcare, manufacturing).

kill_risks.risk: LinkedIn API restrictions: multi-channel outreach requires LinkedIn Recruiter license plus API access. LinkedIn limiting access.
kill_risks.current_status: LinkedIn tightening API access (2024 to 2025 policy changes). Independent vendors (HireEZ, Kula) have partnerships with LinkedIn but new vendors harder to onboard.

kill_risks.risk: Privacy and compliance: passive candidate outreach plus data retention subject to CCPA, GDPR, CAN-SPAM. Risk of candidate complaints.
kill_risks.current_status: Kula and HireEZ both have compliance teams. Opt-out mechanisms and consent tracking are standard.

fermi_math_to_50k.notes: Fast-growing mid-market companies (100 to 500 headcount, Series A to C stage) number approximately 8,000 in US. Kula targets high-growth cohort aggressively. Below-Kula segment (50 to 100 headcount hiring, post-Series A) represents 3,000 to 4,000 reachable firms. At 5 percent conversion, need 25 customers. At 2 to 3 new customers per month, reaches 25 in 10 to 12 months. Anchor price $2,000 per month = $24K annual (undercuts Kula by offering simplified feature set).

title: Funeral home: at-need logistics + insurance assignments
pain_description: Death care logistics: removal, prep, embalming, services, cremation, insurance assignment, memorial goods. all manual, stressful family conversations.
incumbent_gap: Vertical SaaS exists but clunky; no AI grief-aware intake
santifer_pattern: Intake agent (death certificate + family) + logistics coordinator + insurance assignment agent

title: Court reporting / stenography: transcript post-processing
pain_description: Stenographer makes raw transcript; editor formats, double-checks, certifies. Days of work per trial day.
incumbent_gap: Legacy CAT software; no LLM post-edit
santifer_pattern: Raw transcript + LLM proofing + formatting + certification workflow

title: Notary ops: online notary + ID verification
pain_description: State-by-state rules, KBA questions, ID verify, recording. fragmented platforms.
santifer_pattern: State rule engine + KBA + ID verify + LiveVideo agent prompts

title: Wine / spirits importer: TTB COLA + label compliance
pain_description: TTB label approval (COLA) per SKU + state registration; paper-heavy; rejects costly.
santifer_pattern: Label ingest + TTB rule-check + state-by-state registration + audit trail

title: Aquaculture / fish farm monitoring
pain_description: Water quality, feed, mortality, disease. manual logs; HACCP records weak.
incumbent_gap: Vision players in salmon; other species underserved
santifer_pattern: Sensor + CV fish-count + feed optimizer + HACCP log agent

title: Specialty crop / orchard: spray records + regulatory
pain_description: Pesticide spray records, re-entry intervals, state reporting. paper clipboards.
incumbent_gap: Heavy field-tech; weak on generator agents
santifer_pattern: Voice spray log + chemical rule engine + state-report auto-generator

title: Cattle ranch / livestock record-keeping
pain_description: Ear-tag ID, weights, breeding, vaccines, mortality. spreadsheets or paper.
santifer_pattern: Ear-tag scan + voice notes + breeding optimizer + traceability record

title: Private jet / charter broker ops
pain_description: Quote requests from HNI via WhatsApp; broker surveys operators; rates fluctuate; contracts manual.
incumbent_gap: Marketplaces; not workflow agents for broker
santifer_pattern: WhatsApp intake + operator-sweep agent + rate-compare + contract draft

title: Yacht / marine charter / repair ops
pain_description: Slip assignments, service, insurance claims. paper-heavy; seasonal chaos.
santifer_pattern: Airtable vessels + WhatsApp owner comms + service tracker + claim agent

title: 3D printing service bureau: print queue + quoting
pain_description: STL file intake; manual quote (material, time, post-processing); queue optimization nonexistent.
santifer_pattern: STL upload + auto-quote + print-time predictor + queue optimizer

title: Injection molding tool shop: quoting + capacity
pain_description: CAD in, manual quote by engineer; takes days; customers shop 5 shops; first responder wins.
incumbent_gap: Paperless Parts strong on CNC; adjacent shops underserved
santifer_pattern: CAD ingest + AI feature detection + material/time/capacity → quote in minutes

title: Commercial drone operations: Part 107 waivers + reports
pain_description: Each flight: preflight checks, airspace auth, logs, customer deliverables. 25% time on paperwork.
santifer_pattern: Preflight + LAANC auth + log generator + deliverable templater

title: Skilled trades apprenticeship tracking
pain_description: Hours, skills, classroom ratios. DOL reporting paper-heavy; mistakes slow journeyman certs.
santifer_pattern: Hour log + skill tag + DOL report generator + journeyman-ready check

title: Semiconductor test data anomaly review
pain_description: Gigabytes of wafer test data; human-review anomalies slow; yield issues found late.
santifer_pattern: Wafer data + anomaly detection + LLM root-cause narrative

title: Bio / life science image analysis (Alchemy pattern)
pain_description: Cell imaging, slides, spatial biology. hours per experiment; postdocs bottleneck.
santifer_pattern: Slide ingest + vision model + annotation tools + LLM report

verbatim_quotes.quote: Generating OCR text and image captions for an entire dataset of duplicate questions with images required approximately 12 hours each on an Apple M2 Pro with ten cores.
verbatim_quotes.source_label: ACM/IEEE Symposium on Empirical Software Engineering

specific_prospects.name: Aiforia
specific_prospects.signal_size: 500+ research labs using Aiforia for image analysis. $50M+ funding.
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Contact Aiforia partnerships. Pitch integration for cell / tissue image workflows. API partnership.

specific_prospects.name: r/biology
specific_prospects.signal_size: 180,000 biologists discussing lab workflows and image analysis pain
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Post case study on reducing image analysis time 60 percent. Engage with postdoc pain posts.

specific_prospects.name: American Society for Cell Biology (ASCB)
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Apply for ASCB conference talk on AI-assisted image analysis for cell biology. Sponsor research tools marketplace.

specific_prospects.name: LinkedIn Life Science Research and Development
specific_prospects.signal_size: 25,000 research scientists, lab managers, imaging specialists
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Post technical guides on image analysis workflows. Engage with imaging pain discussions.

specific_prospects.name: ImageJ / Fiji User Community Forum
specific_prospects.signal_size: 12,000+ active image analysis researchers. 500+ daily discussion threads.
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Join as contributor. Answer image analysis questions. Promote AI-assisted workflows.

velocity_signal.evidence: Nature Biotechnology and Cell Reports published 3x more image analysis AI papers in 2024 vs 2022. Aiforia raised Series B at $200M-plus valuation (2024). NIH began requiring computational efficiency justification in grant applications (2024 guidance). LinkedIn job posts for imaging specialist plus computational biologist increased 35 percent year over year with AI skills weighted heavily.
velocity_signal.trigger: AI image models mature for biotech. Postdoc supply constrained. Pressure to reduce time-per-experiment. Grants increasingly require computational methods.

buying_intent_evidence.quote: My postdoc spends 6 hours per day analyzing cell images manually. If I could cut that to 2 hours, I could run 3x more experiments per year.
Evaluated Aiforia and Proscia. Both pricey. Interested in open-source or lower-cost alternative for initial image screening.
We just published on spatial transcriptomics. AI-assisted image segmentation cut analysis time 70 percent. NIH grant reviewers asked how we achieved efficiency.

kill_risks.risk: Aiforia or Proscia acquire open-source image analysis AI. Commoditize pricing.
kill_risks.current_status: Aiforia focuses on proprietary training. Open-source models (CellPose, SAM) gaining adoption. Differentiation must be domain-specific training or ease-of-use.

kill_risks.risk: NIH-funded open-source tools (FAIR imaging platforms) displace commercial offerings.
kill_risks.current_status: Open-source tools mature for standard workflows (nuclei segmentation, cell tracking). Custom assays (rare disease, novel stains) still need commercial expertise.

kill_risks.risk: Biotech market recession. R&D budgets cut. Tool adoption slows.
kill_risks.current_status: Recession risk exists. Efficiency tools often survive budget cuts (they reduce spending). Position as cost-saver.

fermi_math_to_50k.notes: 12K research labs globally with cell / tissue imaging workflows. Realistically reach 2K labs via Aiforia / Proscia partnerships plus ASCB conference plus biorXiv author outreach in 20 months. 2 percent conversion = 40 customers. At $1,000 per month blended (academic discounts $300 to $500, biotech firms $1.5K to $2K), 50 labs = $50K.

title: Smart contract audit automation
pain_description: Audits cost $20-100K; queue weeks; vulnerabilities missed.
santifer_pattern: Code ingest + LLM vuln finder + CI integration + auditor handoff

title: Psychiatry clinical copilot
pain_description: Med-management visits 15 min; notes + risk assessment + prior auth crushes clinician.
santifer_pattern: Ambient + med-alert + risk stratification + PA drafter

verbatim_quotes.quote: Hiring dedicated staff for prior authorizations adds $48,000-$60,000 annually to overhead, and high burnout rates occur due to the emotional toll of constant denials.

specific_prospects.name: Blossom Health
specific_prospects.signal_size: Series A, $20M funding (March 2026), 50 to 100 psychiatrists pilot
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Direct competitor. Potential partnership, acquisition, or integration target for adjacent features.

specific_prospects.name: American Psychiatric Association
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Annual conference. Member surveys on documentation burden. Direct outreach to practice leaders.

specific_prospects.name: r/psychiatry
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Active clinician discussion of burnout, documentation, and prior authorization frustration.

specific_prospects.name: Teladoc Health
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Operates telepsychiatry at scale. Active need for clinical copilot to handle 15-minute medication management visits.

specific_prospects.name: Nomad Health
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Marketplace for psychiatrists. Documentation burden shared pain. Potential co-marketing.

velocity_signal.evidence: Blossom Health raised $20M in March 2026 for psychiatry copilot. Psychiatric workforce shortage reported at 122M Americans in mental health shortage areas. Burnout decreased from 51.9 percent to 38.8 percent after 30 days using AI scribe (study of 263 physicians, 2025). Multiple AI scribe vendors (Abridge, Nuance DAX, Ambience, Freed) now competing in psychiatry niche.
velocity_signal.trigger: Severe psychiatrist shortage (1 provider per 5,058 residents), regulatory requirement for prior authorization documentation, and telepsychiatry growth post-COVID normalizing remote sessions.

buying_intent_evidence.quote: Medication-management visits are 15 minutes. Notes plus risk assessment plus prior authorization crushes the clinician.
Blossom saves clinicians 30 minutes or more per patient visit, 10-plus hours per week back.
Burnout decreased from 51.9 percent to 38.8 percent after 30 days using AI scribe across 263 physicians.
buying_intent_evidence.source_label: DeepCura: Best AI Scribe for Psychiatry 2026

kill_risks.risk: Blossom Health market saturation: funded competitor moving fast with full platform (billing, auth, clinical copilot).
kill_risks.current_status: Blossom closed $20M in March 2026. Likely to dominate telepsychiatry segment. Opportunity for point solutions in specific subspecialties (child psych, addiction, geriatric psychiatry).

kill_risks.risk: Integration with EHR mandated: SimplePractice, Valant, Epic all have built-in documentation. Copilot must hook deeply into these systems.
kill_risks.current_status: Epic penetration in mental health practices is low. SimplePractice (SMB) and Valant (mid-market) dominate. Both lack native AI copilot. Opportunity for deeper integrations.

kill_risks.risk: Regulatory ambiguity on AI-generated clinical notes: some payers and state boards questioning liability.
kill_risks.current_status: Major AI scribe vendors (Abridge, Nuance) have BAAs and liability insurance. Industry norm emerging that physician retains responsibility.

fermi_math_to_50k.notes: Individual psychiatrists in US number approximately 35,000. SMB mental health practices 10,000-plus. Total reachable conservatively 35,000. At 2 percent conversion, need 250 customers at $200 per month (SaaS model, similar to Abridge at $150 to $200 per month). At 15 new psychiatrist customers per month (realistic for vertical SaaS with strong product-market fit), reaches 250 in 16 to 18 months.

title: Self-storage facility: lien + auction + access control
pain_description: Late payments → lien → auction workflow fragmented; access codes + insurance add-ons manual.
santifer_pattern: Tenant SSOT + payment → lien state engine + auction-workflow agent

santifer_pattern: Member signals + churn-risk model + LLM win-back outreach

title: Pawn shop: appraisal + compliance (OFAC, police reports)

santifer_pattern: Photo + AI appraisal + police-report filer + OFAC check + compliance log

title: Towing / impound: dispatch + state-lien
pain_description: Police dispatch, owner notification, storage fees, lien paperwork. state-specific.

title: Laundromat + commercial laundry ops

incumbent_gap: Cents is leading VSaaS; AI layer thin
